title: selaginella volubilis
intro: Selaginella volubilis, also known as the "Vine Spikemoss" or "Hairy Lip Fern", is a type of plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family, characterized by its creeping stems and small, spiky leaves. Traditionally, Selaginella volubilis has been used in various herbal remedies for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Selaginella volubilis is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its potential medicinal and therapeutic effects.
